title: Optimized Visuals
description: A modpack aimed to enhance visuals within the game. From new particles, smoother items, and more. Great for SMP or content creation-related playing!
body:
Inspired by my favorite visual mods, I choose to compile them into a modpack for others to enjoy! Some examples of what is added are on the **Gallery** Tab. 

Alongside the visual enhancement mods are other mods like _Sodium_, so even with the new particles and details, performance shouldn't be decreased!

Enjoy using **Optimized Visuals** for _Content Creation_, _cinematics_, or just _everyday visual use_!

As of 1.20.6+, **Litematica**, **Tweakeroo**, and **MiniHUD** are no longer being maintained on CurseForge, a trusted user has been porting them on GitHub. If you would like to download the mods for yourself they are linked below, and make sure to download **MaLiLib** as well, as it is needed for the other mods to function.

[Litematica](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/litematica)
[Tweakeroo](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/tweakeroo)
[MiniHUD](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/minihud)
[MaLiLib](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/malilib)
